Reliable Small Engine Repairs
You Can Count On.

Based in Holland Patent, NY. We fix, tune, and service the equipment that keeps your yard, property, and trails moving — fast, affordable, and dependable.

Get your equipment back fast.

Convenient and hassle-free.

Local, friendly, responsive.

Ready for the season

We tune it, test it, and get it running right.

From spring startup service to pre-winter snowblower & snowmobile prep — we keep your gear dependable year-round.

Location

Holland Patent, NY

Phone / Text

(315) 813-8109

❄️ Off-season services available

Snowblower and snowmobile service in the off-season. Mower & trimmer tune-ups before spring. Don't wait until it breaks down.

Services

Repairs & tune-ups for the equipment you count on.

We fix, tune, and service equipment so it's ready for the season. Get mowers, trimmers, chainsaws, rototillers, pressure washers, and blowers ready for spring and summer. Bring snowblowers and snowmobiles in during the off-season.

🌿

Lawn Mowers

Blade, belt, carburetor, and startup issues with season-ready tune-ups.

🪚

Chainsaws

Tune-ups and troubleshooting so your saw cuts clean and starts reliably.

🧵

Weed Eaters / Trimmers

Hard starts, fuel problems, and weak running fixed right.

🚜

Rototillers

Serviced and running strong before garden season starts.

💦

Pressure Washers

Ready for home jobs, cleanup work, and heavy use.

🍂

Leaf Blowers

Tune-ups and repairs for strong, dependable performance.

❄️

Snowblowers

Serviced before the snow season so they're ready when it hits.

🛷

Snowmobiles

Off-season service and repairs — trail-ready for winter.

🏁

Go-Karts

Weekend and family fun machines kept running right.

🏍️

Dirt Bikes

Diagnose and service dirt bikes that need to be running right again.

🛠️

Other Yard Toys

Small engine and needs attention? Reach out. We like a challenge.

📱 Message, call, or text

How it works

Simple process — get your gear back to work.

1

Message, call or text us

Tell us what you have, what it's doing, and how to reach you.

2

We pick up or you drop off

Free pickup & delivery available, or bring it by — your choice.

3

We fix & tune it

We diagnose the problem, make the repair, and tune it to run better.

4

Back ready to run — fast

Quick turnaround so you get back to the job, yard, or trail.

Contact

Request Service

Tell us what you have and what it's doing. We'll get back to you fast.

We'll get back to you as soon as we can.

Call or text anytime

(315) 813-8109

Fastest way to reach us. Call or text and tell us what you need.

Good to include in your message

  • Equipment type and make/model if you know it
  • What it's doing and when the problem started
  • Pickup/delivery or will you drop it off?
  • Your city or neighborhood for service planning
